name: sec-edgar-pp-mcp
description: Every SEC filing, every XBRL fact, every insider trade — synced into a local SQLite store you can pivot, search, and watch offline.

sec_edgar_user_agent.title: SEC EDGAR User-Agent
sec_edgar_user_agent.description: The SEC requires a User-Agent header with a name and contact email on every request to data.sec.gov and www.sec.gov. There is no API key. Set SEC_EDGAR_USER_AGENT='Your Name your@email.com' and the CLI will send it on every call.
